sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3961" key="a)leifati/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλειφᾰτίτης</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄρτος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, bread <sense id="n3961.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">baked with oil</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:52" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
